title: Viewer Evidence Frontmatter
description: Frontmatter contract for priv/viewer_evidence/<surface>/<viewer>.md files. Each evidence file must stay within a 65536-byte budget on disk.

surface.description: Evidence surface segment; must match the parent directory under priv/viewer_evidence/.

viewer.description: Viewer key; must match the filename stem under priv/viewer_evidence/<surface>/.

viewer_version.description: Recorded viewer or runtime version at observation time.

platform.description: Single OS + platform string describing the observation environment.

recorded_at.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) when evidence was recorded.

fixture.description: Repo-relative path to the PDF fixture used for this observation.

fixture_sha256.description: Content-addressed fixture reference when no repo path is stored.

behaviors.description: Per-behavior observation rows aligned with matrix proof[] IDs for the promoted cell.

behavior.description: Matrix proof[] behavior identifier for this cell.

note.description: Non-empty operator note, required even when result is pass.
